mapper.insert: INSERT INTO pw_policy_prize (policy_id, prize_id, prize_name, total_quantity, remaining_quantity, win_rate) VALUES (#{policyId}, #{prizeId}, #{prizeName}, #{totalQuantity}, #{remainingQuantity}, #{winRate})

INSERT INTO pw_policy_prize (policy_id, prize_id, prize_name, total_quantity, remaining_quantity, win_rate) VALUES
(#{item.policyId}, #{item.prizeId}, #{item.prizeName}, #{item.totalQuantity}, #{item.remainingQuantity}, #{item.winRate})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM pw_policy_prize WHERE policy_id = #{policyId} ORDER BY win_rate DESC
SELECT * FROM pw_policy_prize WHERE policy_id = #{policyId} AND prize_id = #{prizeId}
mapper.update: UPDATE pw_policy_prize SET remaining_quantity = remaining_quantity - 1 WHERE policy_id = #{policyId} AND prize_id = #{prizeId} AND remaining_quantity > 0
